source.quote: Never commit sensitive values: Use `.env.test.local` for API keys, tokens, etc.

supporting_source.quote: DO NOT commit sensitive values - use .env.test.local for secrets

statement: Sensitive test API keys, tokens, and similar values must be kept in .env.test.local and must not be written into committed test environment files or staged for commit.
directives: Allow sensitive test values to be written to .env.test.local, which is ignored by git.
Forbid flows of sensitive API keys or tokens into committed env files such as .env.test or .env.test.example, especially when followed by git add or git commit.
